title.en: Of course, it is more difficult to create such ...

content.en:
After mastering the way of the sword, Ye Tian tried to comprehend the space, and found that his speed of comprehending the space was a little faster.

"It seems that controlling one path after another really helps to control the space, don't rush to the comprehension space first, in the case of not being able to control the space, the comprehension space will not be able to improve its strength. @叶天喃喃道.

After mastering the way of the sword, Ye Tian could combine time with the way of the sword to create a new supreme technique, and that supreme technique would be more powerful.

Of course, it is more difficult to create such a supreme technique.

In the following days, Ye Tian tried his best to create such a supreme skill, after all, he was now only able to use the offensive time supreme technique time dripping, and his power was a little weak.

Therefore, he wanted to create a more powerful supreme technique.

With the help of three thousand iris, Ye Tian's progress was very fast.

When Ye Tian was here for enlightenment at the Three Thousand Kirins, another replica body was constantly practicing the supreme technique in a void area, trying to combine time and sword dao to create a more killing supreme technique.

Drill after drill, endless drill.

Ten million eternal years!

30 million eternal years!

Eighty million eternal years!

In the 160 Void Region, Ziyi Eternal Year is also known as the Eternal Era.

And Ye Tian fully comprehended and practiced three eternal eras, and finally created a quite powerful supreme technique.

Somewhere in the Void Zone.

A median Eternal Supreme Treasure Long Sword appeared in Ye Tian's hand, this sword was called Zixu Sword, and it was one of the three Eternal Supreme Treasures left by the Lord of Moshan Mofeng.

"Extinguish!"

Ye Tian stabbed lightly with the Zixu Sword in his hand, a flash of sword light appeared, and the infinite time and space in front of him shattered like a mirror, and this sword even directly pierced the long river of time.

"It's done, it's about seven times more powerful than a drop of time!"

Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

Although this supreme technique is still far inferior to the top supreme technique created by the peak legendary realm lords, it is also quite a powerful supreme skill.

With the creation of such a supreme technique, Ye Tian's strength suddenly increased a lot.

"Let's call it the Void River Sword Light!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

After creating the Void River Sword Light, Ye Tian rested for a while, and was not in a hurry to continue creating the supreme technique.

He even accompanied his wife to visit various places in the Infinite Sea and enjoyed a leisurely time.

this day.

Ye Tian received a message from the Dragon Gu Lord, and a copy body came directly to the Ancient Lord

Busy Ancient Lord, what are you looking for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

Lord Longgu said, "Endless Lord, we may have discovered Lord Trickery.

Ye Tian was quite surprised, "Have you found the Lord of the Tricky Star?" as far as I know, he should be hiding in the Void River Boundary Array, could it be that he came out of the Void River Boundary Array?"

"No, the Star Lord is still hiding in the Star Barrier, but we found him. "

Lord Longgu said with a smile.

"What's going on?" Ye Tian was puzzled, the Void River Boundary Array claimed to be able to block the exploration of any Legendary Realm Lord at the peak of the Legendary Realm Lord, this was no joke

"Could it be that we really have no Holy Land, which Legendary Realm Lord has broken through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord?" Ye Tian joked.

"Not really. The Dragon Ancient Lord shook his head, "It was the Lord of the Dark Word who tried to control the space and find another way. "

Lord of the Word!

Ye Tian naturally knew about this Legendary Realm, she was the most powerful Legendary Realm Lord in the True Territory, and she was also the most promising one to become the Peak Legendary Realm Lord before, a little more powerful than the True Spirit Lord, but she had been in retreat and cultivating, studying and breaking through to the Peak Legendary Realm Lord from other directions.

It is said that this Legendary Realm Lord often causes his clone to fall, so this Legendary Realm Lord is very poor and has no resources, so he will come out to earn a little resources and continue his research

Originally, she had been in retreat and could not be born

But last time, the Three Thousand Iris was obtained by the True Immortal Land, and she also entered the Three Thousand Iris Meditation Cultivation.

With the help of the three thousand kites, she can be regarded as a supreme skill, although it is not of great use to break through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord, but in terms of tracking the enemy, the Immortal Lord is second only to the Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

"Lord Longgu, let's go to the Lord of the Underword, this time we must kill the Lord of the Evil Star, otherwise if you keep him, the future will be a disaster after all. Ye Tian said.

"Naturally, this time he must be killed. Lord Longgu nodded.

Soon, they came to the Lord of Stygian.

"Endless Lord, Dragon Ancient Lord, you are here. "

Whisperlord Dao.

"Lord of the Underword, where is the Lord of the Stars?" Ye Tian asked.

"Here!"

With a wave of his hand, the Stygian Lord revealed a map of the area.

"This area between the Void Quiet Sea and the Storm Sea is a bit far away from the Infinite Sea, this void area has no value, and the Lord of the Stars chose to build the Void River Boundary Array here for fear of being discovered," the Lord of the Dark Word said.

Immediately, in front of Ye Tian and the Dragon Gu Lord, the Lord of the Underworld once again used that supreme skill, fluctuating time and space, and looking for the Lord of the Tricky Star.

Buzz Buzz!!

The time and space in front of him were peeled off layer by layer, and soon a formation appeared in front of the Lord of the Underworld, Ye Tian, and Lord Longgu.

And this layer of formation was directly peeled away, revealing the position of the Star Lord.

At this moment, the Star Lord was not aware of it, and was still in retreat and cultivating.

"It's really him!"

Ye Tian confirmed.

"Lord of the Word, we're going to kill the Lord of the Stars, are you going?" asked Lord Longgu.

"Forget it, I'm not going, you know the location, you can go. "

The Lord of the Word is a bit salted, and now he really has no interest in killing.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian, Lord of Longgu, Lord of True Spirit, Lord of the Barren River, Lord of Frostless, Lord of Baiheng, Lord of the Legendary Realm, set out one by one, crossed the long river of time, and quickly came to the area where the Lord of the Strange Star was located.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian had already sensed that the Void River Boundary Array was almost integrated with the Void Region, but in the eyes of the Legendary Realm Lord, if the Void River Boundary Array was seen at close range, it could be seen at a glance, and it could not be hidden at all.

Void River Boundary Array.

The Star Lord opened his eyes and sensed something was wrong.

"There is a Legendary Realm Lord approaching!"

The Star Lord panicked. _
